scripts.build: pnpm run build:css && pnpm run build:dist
scripts.build:dist: rm -rf ./dist && mkdir -p ./dist/styles ./dist/assets && cp ./index.html ./dist/index.html && cp -R ../icons ./dist/assets/icons && cp -R ../frontend/public/icons ./dist/assets/agents && cp ./styles/landing.css ./dist/styles/landing.css
scripts.dev: pnpm run sync && concurrently -k -n css,sync,serve -c blue,green,yellow "tailwindcss -i ./landing.css -o ./dist/styles/landing.css --watch" "chokidar './index.html' '../icons/**/*' '../frontend/public/icons/**/*' -c 'pnpm run sync'" "browser-sync start --server dist --files 'dist/**/*' --no-open"
